sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Twin Distraction
feat.text: Your movements with two weapons are so swift and disorienting that they befuddle your opponent. When using Twin Feint, if both your Strikes deal damage to a targeted creature, the target must succeed at a Will saving throw against your class DC or become stupefied 1 until the end of your next turn.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.

archetype.name: Red Mantis Assassin
archetype.note: This archetype offers Twin Distraction at a different level than displayed here.

feat.requirement: You are wielding two melee weapons, each in a different hand
